summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jogo Milícia Digital V2. Most features working correctly including XP system, missions, equipment selection, WhatsApp integration, and SEO optimization. Found one localStorage issue with credits persistence.

ui_bugs.issue: Credits not being saved to localStorage after mission completion
ui_bugs.details: XP is properly saved (175 XP after mission), but credits remain at 0 despite showing +R$1,00 message

passed_tests: Initial screen loads with logo, XP bar, and R$1 promo
XP bar shows Level 1 Noob with 0 XP initially
JOGAR GRÁTIS button works and navigates to missions
5 missions displayed with correct colored zones (3 green, 1 yellow, 1 red)
WhatsApp floating button visible with correct phone number (+5521972232170)
Audio toggle button functional (changes from 🔇 to 🔊)
Mission selection opens game screen correctly
Equipment selection system working with visual feedback
Step completion awards +25 XP per step
Mission completion screen shows product highlight
WhatsApp CTA button on completion screen
WhatsApp integration with correct message formatting
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix localStorage credits persistence issue in mission completion flow. Credits should be saved when mission is completed, but currently only XP is being saved properly.
